hero.headline: Building the future, one line of code at a time.
hero.sub: 18 years old. Brazilian. Developer, founder of Null Forge, future Computer Science student aiming for the Ivy League.

about.title: About
about.bio1: 18-year-old Brazilian developer. Currently building systems at a logistics company, co-founder of The Kaden (WhatsApp automation SaaS), founder of Null Forge, and high-school senior in Uberlândia, Brazil.
about.bio2: Focused on products with real impact, clean code, and quality that's noticed. Every line of code is a statement of intent.

discipline.title: Discipline
discipline.desc: Consistency beats talent. Every day counts.

vision.desc: I see beyond the code — product, impact, legacy.

impact.title: Impact
impact.desc: What I build needs to change something in the real world.

aboutPage.headline: One line at a time.
aboutPage.subHeadline: The story of an 18-year-old developer who started over from scratch.
aboutPage.quote: If you're reading this, it's because someday you'll hear my name again.

2023.title: The restart
2023.desc: After failing a year of school, I made a choice: stop wasting time and start building something real. My parents bet on me. I started studying programming with discipline.

2024.title: Work + night school
2024.desc: I balanced work during the day with school at night. Every free hour went to code. I learned that building a career is about consistency, not talent.

2025.title: Private school + real projects
2025.desc: I transferred to a private school. Launched real projects. Founded Null Forge. Became co-founder of The Kaden. Code started having tangible impact.

2026.title: Present
2026.desc: Developer at a logistics company. Building a new agency. Preparing applications for top international universities.

future.title: Ivy League
future.desc: MIT, Harvard, Oxford. The destination is set. The path is being walked.

letter.p1: In 2023, I was lost. I had failed a year of school. My parents invested in me in a way that made me realize how much I was wasting. It was a reality check that changed everything.
letter.p2: I decided to bet on programming. Not because it was easy — because it was the only path that made sense. I started studying with real discipline for the first time in my life.
letter.p3: In 2024, I worked during the day and studied at night. Every holiday, every weekend, every break became learning time. I learned that discipline is more powerful than talent.
letter.p4: In 2025, things started clicking. I transferred to a private school. Launched projects that solve real problems. Founded Null Forge. Became co-founder of The Kaden.
letter.p5: Today, in 2026, I develop systems at a logistics company and build a new agency. My goal is clear: top international universities — MIT, Harvard, Oxford. It's not a dream. It's a plan.
